name: GOLFTEC Wexford
address: 16055 Perry Hwy Bldg 2, Suite B, Wexford, PA 15090
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven improvement using advanced technology. The facilities feature indoor bays equipped with launch monitors, high-speed cameras, and OPTIMOTION motion tracking systems to provide detailed swing analysis and personalized coaching. Sessions are designed for all skill levels, from beginners refining basics to experienced players optimizing their game, with an emphasis on structured lesson plans and measurable progress. Club fitting services are also available, utilizing technology to optimize equipment for individual swings and performance goals.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including launch monitors and OPTIMOTION swing tracking for precise data
Personalized coaching with PGA-certified instructors using video analysis
Structured improvement plans with measurable progress for consistent results
Convenient indoor facilities allowing practice in any weather
Comprehensive club fitting services with data-optimized equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology mentioned for swing analysis and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and practice, though many golfers prefer to use their own. The facility also offers club fitting services to optimize equipment to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility focuses on instruction and practice without dining services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole simulation session takes approximately 60-90 minutes depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes junior golfers and offers youth programs and coaching suitable for various age groups and skill levels.
